note: Legal Freelance pipeline scrape, 7-day window. 3 new leads scoring 55+ after dedup against daily, pr-freelance, and legal-freelance reports back to 2026-05-06. Strong fund-formation freelance fit at the top (Ontra, Grade A); two fractional-GC operating-company roles round it out. Quality over quantity: Socket Fractional GC was found but excluded as stale (posting removed Feb 2025) and off-ICP (crypto/token regulatory). Axiom Law PE contract counsel and a Robert Half fractional GC were found but suppressed as effective duplicates of leads already in the DB (Axiom Advice & Counsel captured 2026-05-07; Robert Half captured 2026-05-12). Workspace note: the task file referenced an /eloquent-beautiful-newton/ mount path; the actual MarCRM mount this session was used instead.

contacts.name: Ontra Legal Network Team
contacts.title: Lawyer Network Recruiting (US-Licensed Freelance Fund Formation Lawyer)

leads.notes: Combined 80 / Grade A — the strongest fit in this scrape and the cleanest match for Katie's positioning. Pure fund-formation freelance work (LPAs, side letters, term sheets, operating/credit/MSA agreements) on an independent-contractor basis, fully remote, ~15-25 hrs/week. Ontra absorbs invoicing, billing, collections, and BD so the engagement is pure practice. Pitch angle: lead with fund-formation document throughput and judgment from corporate/fund counsel work — emphasize comfort with high-volume routine fund paper plus the ability to flag the non-routine. This is a network/talent-pool application rather than a single dated req, so recency scored 0 and urgency is moderate (55) — but it is a durable, repeatable income stream rather than a one-off. Also note Ontra runs a separate UK/EU-qualified track and a part-time US variant; apply to the US-licensed freelance track.

leads.employmentTypeRaw: Fractional General Counsel (Remote) — ACC Jobline listing #54004
leads.notes: Combined 60 / Grade B. Engagement shape is exactly what Katie is optimizing for: explicit fractional GC, ~1-2 days/week, monthly retainer or fractional hourly, fully remote, and a direct operating-company buyer with no staffing intermediary. Off-ICP on industry (industrial equipment / EPC-style manufacturing) and no fund work, which caps fit at 20. Scope is commercial-contract-heavy (review/redline/negotiate equipment supply and project agreements) plus generalist coverage — insurance, employment, real estate, outside-counsel coordination. Pitch angle: position as a high-judgment fractional GC who brings playbook discipline and contract throughput, can stand up scalable legal infrastructure for a company that has outgrown ad-hoc outside counsel but cannot justify a full-time hire. Confirm W2 vs. 1099 and exact weekly hours with the hiring manager. ACC Jobline #54004.

contacts.name: Interlink Cloud Advisors — CEO / Hiring
contacts.title: CEO (Fractional GC reports directly to CEO)

leads.notes: Combined 60 / Grade B. Explicit fractional GC, fully remote, reports straight to the CEO, mandate to 'build scalable legal infrastructure' — a classic company-outgrowing-ad-hoc-counsel buyer. Scope is contract-management-heavy (MSAs, PSAs, NDAs, vendor/subcontractor agreements) plus legal strategy, risk, and regulatory/compliance including SOC 2. Off-ICP on industry (Microsoft cloud consulting) and no fund work, capping fit at 20. The posting names '3+ years' which reads junior for a GC title — likely budget-constrained — so qualify the comp and scope expectations early. Pitch angle: a senior fractional GC who can install playbooks, NDA/MSA templates, and a contract workflow fast, then run light-touch ongoing coverage. Apply via the Paylocity portal; warm path is direct LinkedIn outreach to the CEO offering a scoped 'legal infrastructure stand-up' engagement.
